seoTitle: Gunningrah vs Gurley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gunningrah and Gurley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gunningrah and Gurley.
heading: Gunningrah vs Gurley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gunningrah, New South Wales and Gurley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gunningrah has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Gurley (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gunningrah or Gurley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gunningrah has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Gurley scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gunningrah scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Gurley scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gunningrah or Gurley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gunningrah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
